NSCameraUsageDescription HanzoBot can capture photos or short video clips when requested via the gateway. NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription HanzoBot discovers and connects to your HanzoBot gateway on the local network. NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription HanzoBot uses your location when you allow location sharing. NSMicrophoneUsageDescription HanzoBot needs microphone access for voice wake.
